title: Totems of Warping
description: Adds custom totems allowing players to warp to lodestones or their last death location.
body:
Download the optional resource pack [HERE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kMFObSC3/versions/qRyZkizc/Warp%20Totem%20RP%20v1.1.1.zip)

The Totem of Warping allows players to teleport to various locations. The totem can either be used to teleport to the player's spawn point or, if connected to a lodestone, it can be used to teleport back to it at any time. Use the totem for 5 seconds to warp.  
![A recipe using the minecraft 3x3 crafting grid. At the center is an ender pearl with an obsidian block to the top, left, right, and bottom. There are diamonds in the two upper corners. The output is a black totem resembling an Enderman holding an ender pearl.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb45daecd2ccd53b7336ff36c85bded2132d442.png)

The Totem of Recovery allows players to teleport to their last death location.  
![A recipe using the minecraft 3x3 crafting grid. At the center is an ender pearl with an obsidian block to the top, left, right, and bottom. There are echo shards in the two upper corners. The output is a dark blue totem resembling a Warden.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edd000d67b47af2d01a00930316e9fccc79be0d6.png)


Two versions are available, the Single Use version and the Infinite Use version. Single use consumes the totems on use. Infinite Use can be used indefinitely but offers a toggle which will consume either Ender Pearls or Echo Shards. The toggle can be found in data/xtligh/function/warp_totem/config.json
